Pocket Sand.description: Flings a handful of sand into the target's eyes, drastically reducing their accuracy.

Low Blow.description: A dirty strike targeting weak points, leaving the target more vulnerable to all damage.

Poison Spit.description: Spits a glob of toxic fluid at the target, dealing minor damage and inflicting poison.

Armor Piercer.description: Strikes with focused force that bypasses the target's armor entirely, ignoring all defenses.

Heavy Blow.description: A slow, brutally powerful strike that trades speed for devastating impact.

Meditate.description: Enters a deep meditative state that fully restores MP, at the cost of considerable delay.

Flourish.description: A swift, flashy flourish with a brief startup that recharges the user's skill cooldowns.

Lunge.description: Charges forward after a long windup, delivering a powerful thrust that delays the target's next action.

Cleave.description: A wide sweeping strike that slashes through all enemies at once.

Brace.description: Takes a guarded stance over two turns, bracing against the next incoming attack to reduce damage taken.

Pinpoint Hit.description: A carefully aimed strike that sacrifices raw power to guarantee a critical hit.

Crush.description: An unarmed crushing blow of tremendous force, independent of any weapon.

Mana Explosion.description: Releases all stored mana in a devastating explosion. Damage scales with MP consumed.

Assassinate.description: A precise strike targeting vital points, with a high chance of landing a critical blow.

Regen.description: Channels healing energy inward, gradually regenerating HP over several turns.

First Aid.description: Applies quick field treatment to patch wounds and restore a small amount of HP.

Bite.description: A snapping bite that tears into the target with teeth or jaws.

Claws.description: A rapid double swipe with claws that strikes the target twice in quick succession.

Gorgon Eye.description: A paralyzing gaze that channels gorgon power, with a high chance to stun the target where they stand.

Shiver.description: An ice-cold attack that chills the target to the bone, with a chance to freeze them solid.

Integer.description: A calculated magical strike shaped by geometric formulas, dealing precise arcane damage.

Recharge.description: Takes a brief moment to recover focus, resetting the user's skill cooldowns.

Bloodsucker.description: Sinks fangs into the target, siphoning their life force to restore the user's own vitality.

Block.description: Takes a guarded stance, raising defenses to significantly reduce damage taken for several turns.

Dodge.description: Reads the opponent's movements and slips out of the way, becoming impossible to hit for one turn.

Combo.description: Unleashes a rapid flurry of three strikes in quick succession, each drawing on weapon and strength.

Burning Wave.description: A scorching wave that engulfs the target, leaving them burned.

Dive.description: Removes the user from battle entirely.

Flee.description: Removes the user from battle entirely.

Raise Zombie.description: Calls a rotting corpse from the earth to fight.

Raise Ghost.description: Tears the veil and drags a restless spirit into battle.

Raise Skeleton.description: Animates bleached bones with fell necromantic energy.

Wait.description: Does nothing. Passes the turn without acting.

Take Flight.description: Leaps into the air, drastically reducing incoming physical damage — but becoming a prime target for ranged attacks.

Knife Throw.description: Hurls a rapid flurry of blades at the target, striking twice in quick succession.

Juggle Throw.description: A building volley — the longer the wait, the more blades in the air.

Party Trick.use_text: [b][USER][/b] grins and reaches into their hat...

Crack the Whip.description: A snapping whip strike that leaves the target reeling with a high chance to stun.

Raise Curtain.description: Summons a Harlequin from the wings of the performance.
Raise Curtain.use_text: [b][USER][/b] snaps his fingers. The curtain rises.

Mirror Morph.description: Assumes the exact form of the target, copying their stats, skills, and spells.
